title: いきなりマーダーミステリー！　その1

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: SH-SHE'S DEAD?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking down the hallway, I hear ominous
shrieks from somewhere nearby! I rush over in a
panic, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, who would've thought King's food was
poisoned?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We're terribly sorry to have alarmed you,
but everything is under control.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's a murder mystery game, amigo! King's fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They explain that the game involves solving a
murder case based on the clues given to each
individual player.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! We don't actually have a GM
yet—that's "game master," by the way. Would you
mind being ours?
choice_data_list: I guess I can do that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so I find myself game-mastering a murder.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Let's start with the circumstances surrounding
our victim. King was found in the evening,
collapsed in one of the inn's guest rooms.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The cause of death seems to be poison mixed into
a bowl of egg custard served with dinner. Other
than that, there were reports of a loud shattering
sound just before King died.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A fittingly ominous start to a murder mystery...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Geez, that's horrible... Who would do such a
thing?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe we know each other well enough
to judge that, unfortunately.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then let's get started by breakin' the ice! First off,
self-introductions! Ándale!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Shall we begin by detailing our roles, and what
we've done today?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'm Special Week and I'm the cook. Today, I
was toiling away cooking up a feast for King!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And I am a waitress who works at the same inn! I
served King her meal.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hola! I'm a traveling poet staying at the inn! I got
acquainted with King today, so I dropped by her
room to hang out after her meal was served.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heyyy, I'm a housekeeper at this inn, and I've
been cleaning all day long.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With everyone's introductions over, I feel like I've
got a better picture of the situation now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, well... It seems that everyone is suspicious.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm, you said it.
choice_data_list: What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Spe could've added the poison while she
prepared the meal, and Grass could've spiked it
on the way to the room.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Likewise, El could have snuck it in when she
visited King, and Sei could have tampered with
things while cleaning.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No way! I didn't add any poison!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Chillax. This is a game, remember?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah—has anything caught your attention yet,
Trainer? You can go ahead and forget about
being the GM for a minute.
choice_data_list:
Were you cleaning during the evening as well,
Seiun Sky?
Poisoned or not, that stuff sure looks tasty...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, I'm a housekeeper after all. I do try to stick
to places where there aren't any guests around,
though.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: In fact, I barely spend any time around the guests, so I'm not sure why you're suspecting me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky shrugs as she looks over to the
collapsed King Halo. And right then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, the bowl is a different color! I know I
used a yellow one!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My goodness, you're right. It was yellow when I
delivered it as well.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But now it's in a blue bowl. Maybe someone came
into the room and swapped the bowls around
after it was served?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Going by the introductions from earlier, the only
one who came into the room after the dish was
served was El Condor Pasa...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Everyone glances over at her with accusing eyes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? I can't believe there's poison in
there... And after Sei brought me such nice
veggies to cook with, too...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It saddens me greatly that such renowned cuisine
was used as a means for murder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone looks over to the collapsed King Halo
with bowed heads, when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, the bowl is a different color! I know I
used a yellow one!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My goodness, you're right. It was yellow when I
delivered it as well.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But now it's in a blue bowl. Maybe someone came
into the room and swapped the bowls around
after it was served?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Going by the introductions from earlier, the only
one who came into the room after the dish was
served was El Condor Pasa...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Everyone glances over at her with accusing eyes.
